documentation.description:
The expression context provides information to resolve runtime
information when evaluating an expression.  The context provides
a resolver whose role is to find variables given their name.

simple_types.name: Function_Type
simple_types.code: type Function_Type is (F_1_ARG, F_2_ARG, F_3_ARG, F_4_ARG);

record_types.name: Function_Access

access_types.name: Function_1_Access
access_types.code: type Function_1_Access is access function (P : Object) return Object;

access_types.name: Function_2_Access
access_types.code: type Function_2_Access is access function (P1, P2 : Object) return Object;

access_types.name: Function_3_Access
access_types.code: type Function_3_Access is access function (P1, P2, P3 : Object) return Object;

access_types.name: Function_4_Access
access_types.code: type Function_4_Access is access function (P1, P2, P3, P4 : Object) return Object;

access_types.name: Function_Mapper_Access
access_types.code: type Function_Mapper_Access is access all Function_Mapper'Class;
